title: Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)

jsonLd.title: Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is Hiring: Consultant Physician (Senior)
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Consultant Physician looking for your next big career move? Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd in Ranchi offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd:
Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Adhere to NABH/JCI accreditation standards
• Coordinate with multidisciplinary teams for comprehensive patient management
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Ensure patient privacy and maintain confidentiality
• Participate in quality improvement initiatives and clinical audits
• Attend continuing medical education programs and training
• Administer medications and treatments as prescribed

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Telemedicine
• Proficiency in NABH Standards
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in Medical Coding
• Proficiency in Clinical Documentation
• Proficiency in Infection Control
• Proficiency in ICU Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Learning & development budget
• Professional development and training programs
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Ranchi, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Sankara Nethralaya Consulting Pvt Ltd!
